quests.name: The Road Ahead
quests.description: Speak with Elder Thomas and learn about the realm.

steps.text: Learn about the shrine and the threats beyond

quests.lore: Elder Thomas entrusted you with the Waystone of Guidance — an ancient relic that guides heroes on their path.

dialogue.speaker: Elder Thomas
dialogue.text: Welcome, traveler. You've arrived at a troubled time. The Greenhollow Plains were once peaceful, but darkness creeps from the Darkwood to the north. Our realm needs a hero.

dialogue.speaker: Elder Thomas
dialogue.text: This old shrine marks the edge of our lands. Beyond lies the unknown. The creatures grow bolder every day, and the ancient Wardstones that protect us are failing.

dialogue.speaker: Elder Thomas
dialogue.text: Take this — the Waystone of Guidance. It was forged by the first druids to lead heroes through the realm. With it, your path will always be clear. Go now, and may the light guide you.

quests.name: Into the Darkwood
quests.description: Investigate why creatures flee the forest.

steps.text: Speak with Scout Helia about the forest

quests.lore: Ancient wards are failing.

dialogue.speaker: Scout Helia
dialogue.text: The forest is restless. Animals flee south, spirits attack anything that moves.

dialogue.speaker: Archdruid Yennefer
dialogue.text: Welcome to Eldergrove. The forest screams of corruption. We need your help.

quests.name: Corruption's Root

steps.text: Speak with Archdruid Yennefer about the corruption

quests.lore: A shattered Wardstone leaks sealing magic.

dialogue.speaker: Archdruid Yennefer
dialogue.text: The corruption stems from the northeast. An old power stirs there.

dialogue.speaker: Archdruid Yennefer
dialogue.text: A Wardstone... broken. There were five, forged to imprison the Betrayer King.

quests.name: March to Thornwatch
quests.lore: The garrison is undermanned.

dialogue.speaker: Archdruid Yennefer
dialogue.text: Thornwatch must be warned. They'll be the first line of defense.

dialogue.speaker: Captain Aldric
dialogue.text: Bandits AND forest creatures going mad? Head to the Ironpeaks.

quests.name: The Ironpeak Ascent

steps.text: Speak with Captain Aldric about the Wardstone

quests.lore: The Wardstone was taken into the mountains.

dialogue.speaker: Captain Aldric
dialogue.text: Old records mention a Wardstone fragment in the Ironpeaks.

dialogue.speaker: Commander Theron
dialogue.text: The shard was taken to Cinderhold for safekeeping.

quests.name: Forged in Fire
quests.lore: The dwarves forged Wardstones with dragonfire.

dialogue.speaker: Master Smith Durin
dialogue.text: Our forge guardian has gone berserk — corrupted by dark magic. Defeat it, and the shard is yours.

dialogue.speaker: Master Smith Durin
dialogue.text: The second fragment lies beneath the Sunspire, across the desert.

quests.name: Desert Crossing

steps.text: Receive directions from Master Smith Durin

quests.lore: Sunspire was built by vanished Sun Elves.

dialogue.speaker: Master Smith Durin
dialogue.text: Sand wyrms patrol the dunes. But Sunspire still stands.

dialogue.speaker: Elder Solara
dialogue.text: A human, carrying a Wardstone shard? Perhaps you are the one the prophecy speaks of.

quests.name: The Crystal Shore
quests.lore: Mistport pledges support.

dialogue.speaker: Harbormaster Voss
dialogue.text: Pirates have blockaded our trade routes! Help us clear them.

dialogue.speaker: Harbormaster Voss
dialogue.text: The seas are clear! Mistport stands with you.

quests.name: Into the Shadowmere

steps.text: Speak with Elder Solara about the Shadowmere

quests.lore: The Betrayer King was imprisoned, not destroyed.

dialogue.speaker: Elder Solara
dialogue.text: The Shadowmere is where it all began — where the Betrayer King was sealed.

dialogue.speaker: Abbot Kael
dialogue.text: The ritual to reforge the seal requires all fragments.

quests.name: Reassembly
quests.lore: The shards unite. The ritual begins.

dialogue.speaker: Abbot Kael
dialogue.text: Gather the remaining shards. The Betrayer's forces will try to stop you.

dialogue.speaker: Abbot Kael
dialogue.text: All fragments are here. But something approaches...

quests.name: The Betrayer's Champion
quests.lore: The champion falls. The seal holds.

dialogue.speaker: Abbot Kael
dialogue.text: A corrupted dragon leads the assault! Hold them off!

dialogue.speaker: Abbot Kael
dialogue.text: The seal holds. You have saved the realm.

quests.name: The Eternal Watch
quests.lore: You are named Warden of the Realm.

dialogue.speaker: Abbot Kael
dialogue.text: Go forth, Warden. Let the people see their savior.

dialogue.speaker: The People
dialogue.text: Hail, Warden of the Realm! Your name will be sung for a thousand years!

quests.name: Herb Gathering
quests.lore: Healer Mira uses ancient elven remedies.

dialogue.speaker: Healer Mira
dialogue.text: My herb stores are running low. Could you gather moonpetal and sunroot?

dialogue.speaker: Healer Mira
dialogue.text: Perfect specimens! These will make enough salves for the whole village.

quests.name: The Well Problem

steps.text: Speak with Elder Thomas about the well

quests.lore: Slimes nested in the underground spring.

dialogue.speaker: Elder Thomas
dialogue.text: The well water has turned green. Something foul lurks below.

dialogue.speaker: Elder Thomas
dialogue.text: Slimes in the well! Thank you, adventurer.

quests.name: The Old Watchtower

steps.text: Speak with Druid Fenn about the watchtower

quests.lore: The watchtower held lost druid scrolls.

dialogue.speaker: Druid Fenn
dialogue.text: An old watchtower stands north. It may hold useful supplies.

dialogue.speaker: Druid Fenn
dialogue.text: Ancient scrolls! Rituals we thought lost. A great service to the Circle.

quests.name: Missing Merchant
quests.description: Find a merchant lost on the road.

steps.text: Read the guild notice about Merchant Caelen

quests.lore: Merchant Caelen trades rare herbs.

dialogue.speaker: Guild Notice
dialogue.text: MISSING: Merchant Caelen, last seen on the forest road three days ago.

dialogue.speaker: Merchant Caelen
dialogue.text: I thought I was done for! Those wolves had me cornered.

quests.name: Bandit Bounty

steps.text: Druid Fenn examines the strange sigil

quests.lore: The bandits carried the Betrayer King's sigil.

dialogue.speaker: Bounty Board
dialogue.text: WANTED: Bandit leader "Scarface" and gang. 55 gold reward.

dialogue.speaker: Druid Fenn
dialogue.text: A strange sigil among their gear... the mark of the Betrayer King.

quests.name: Haunted Grove

steps.text: Speak with Woodcutter Bram about the ghost lights
Report to Woodcutter Bram about the shrine

quests.lore: Restless spirits guarded a forgotten shrine.

dialogue.speaker: Woodcutter Bram
dialogue.text: The old grove east of here... I saw ghost lights.

dialogue.speaker: Woodcutter Bram
dialogue.text: A shrine? The spirits were protecting their resting place.

quests.name: Thornwatch Patrol
quests.lore: The northern border is busier than expected.

dialogue.speaker: Sergeant Cole
dialogue.text: We're short-handed. Care to walk the line with us?

dialogue.speaker: Sergeant Cole
dialogue.text: Good patrol. I'll put in a word with the Captain.

quests.name: Lost Shrine

steps.text: Speak with Scholar Aldrin about the old maps

quests.lore: The shrine predates human settlement.

dialogue.speaker: Scholar Aldrin
dialogue.text: Old maps mention an elven shrine in the northern highlands.

dialogue.speaker: Scholar Aldrin
dialogue.text: The inscriptions mention the Wardstones by name!

quests.name: Iron Legion Trials

steps.text: Speak with Commander Theron about the Trials
Commander Theron recognizes you as an ally

quests.lore: The Legion respects strength above all.

dialogue.speaker: Commander Theron
dialogue.text: Prove your worth in the Trials. Every ally must pass them.

dialogue.speaker: Commander Theron
dialogue.text: The Iron Legion recognizes you as an ally.

quests.name: Mountain Rescue

steps.text: Speak with Foreman Dag about the trapped miners
Foreman Dag reports ancient tunnels discovered

quests.lore: The collapse revealed ancient tunnels.

dialogue.speaker: Foreman Dag
dialogue.text: Our miners are trapped! Something is moving in the rubble.

dialogue.speaker: Foreman Dag
dialogue.text: Safe! But they say the collapse revealed old tunnels with strange markings.

quests.name: Lake Monster

steps.text: Speak with Fisherman Oden about the lake beast
Fisherman Oden examines the magic crystals

quests.lore: Wardstone magic warped the creature.

dialogue.speaker: Fisherman Oden
dialogue.text: Something big lurks beneath. It capsized two boats.

dialogue.speaker: Fisherman Oden
dialogue.text: The beast is dead! It had magic crystals growing from its body.

quests.name: Dwarven Trials

steps.text: Speak with Master Smith Durin about the trials

quests.lore: Durin grants you a starfall ore blade.

dialogue.speaker: Master Smith Durin
dialogue.text: Prove you can survive the heat. Our trials will test you.

dialogue.speaker: Master Smith Durin
dialogue.text: You fight like heroes of old. Take this starfall blade.

quests.name: Volcanic Vents
quests.description: Gather rare ore from the wastes.

steps.text: Speak with Master Smith Durin about starfall ore
Master Smith Durin appraises the ore

quests.lore: Starfall ore forms near active vents.

dialogue.speaker: Master Smith Durin
dialogue.text: Bring back any starfall ore you find. Worth more than gold.

dialogue.speaker: Master Smith Durin
dialogue.text: Fine ore! The old techniques still work.

quests.name: Desert Nomads

steps.text: Chief Zara shares stories of the Sun Elves

quests.lore: The nomads remember the Sun Elves.

dialogue.speaker: Chief Zara
dialogue.text: The wyrms grow bolder. Help us defend our camp.

dialogue.speaker: Chief Zara
dialogue.text: My grandmother told stories of the Sun Elves. They went underground.

quests.name: Oasis Secrets

steps.text: Speak with Elder Solara about the ruins

quests.lore: Murals depict the original Wardstone forging.

dialogue.speaker: Elder Solara
dialogue.text: Ancient ruins lie southeast. They may hold knowledge we need.

dialogue.speaker: Elder Solara
dialogue.text: These murals show the forging of the Wardstones!

quests.name: Pirate Treasure

steps.text: Speak with Merchant Voss about the stolen goods

quests.lore: The pirates operated for years.

dialogue.speaker: Merchant Voss
dialogue.text: Their loot is in a cave south. Recover our goods!

dialogue.speaker: Merchant Voss
dialogue.text: Our goods! Take your share, hero.

quests.name: Sunken Temple

steps.text: Speak with Scholar Aldrin about the sunken temple

quests.lore: A Wardstone fragment rests at the lake bottom.

dialogue.speaker: Scholar Aldrin
dialogue.text: A sunken temple in Crystal Lake may contain a Wardstone fragment.

dialogue.speaker: Scholar Aldrin
dialogue.text: A fragment! Small, but it pulses with power.

quests.name: Shadow Training

steps.text: Speak with Abbot Kael about shadow combat
Abbot Kael imparts wisdom about balance

quests.lore: Balance is the key to true strength.

dialogue.speaker: Abbot Kael
dialogue.text: To fight darkness, you must understand it.

dialogue.speaker: Abbot Kael
dialogue.text: Remember: the Betrayer King fell because he sought only power.

quests.name: The Dark Spire

steps.text: Speak with Abbot Kael about the dark spire

quests.lore: The nexus fed power to the Betrayer King.

dialogue.speaker: Abbot Kael
dialogue.text: A dark spire channels power to weaken the prison from within.

dialogue.speaker: Abbot Kael
dialogue.text: Destroyed! The Betrayer King's grip weakens.

quests.name: The Frozen North

steps.text: Speak with Explorer Finn about the northern reaches
Explorer Finn marvels at the ancient artifacts

quests.lore: A frozen waste with ancient dangers.

dialogue.speaker: Explorer Finn
dialogue.text: I've mapped the northern reaches. Ice and treasure await.

dialogue.speaker: Explorer Finn
dialogue.text: A frost giant guarding ancient artifacts!

quests.name: Depths of Cinderhold

steps.text: Speak with Master Smith Durin about the deep tunnels
Discover tunnels made by the first dwarves

quests.lore: The tunnels connect to something ancient.

dialogue.speaker: Master Smith Durin
dialogue.text: We've broken through to deeper tunnels. Ancient ones.

dialogue.speaker: Master Smith Durin
dialogue.text: Made by the first dwarves who forged the original Wardstones.

quests.name: Ghost Fleet

steps.text: Speak with Harbormaster Voss about the ghost ships
The Betrayer King's fleet is defeated

quests.lore: The ghost fleet sailed in the Betrayer King's navy.

dialogue.speaker: Harbormaster Voss
dialogue.text: Ghost ships on the lake! An entire fleet.

dialogue.speaker: Harbormaster Voss
dialogue.text: The Betrayer King's fleet, still sailing after centuries.

quests.name: The World Tree

steps.text: Speak with Archdruid Yennefer about the World Tree
Witness the World Tree's roots connecting all life

quests.lore: Source of all natural magic.

dialogue.speaker: Archdruid Yennefer
dialogue.text: Deep in the Darkwood stands the World Tree.

dialogue.speaker: Archdruid Yennefer
dialogue.text: Its roots connect all living things.

quests.name: Eternal Vigil

steps.text: The Eternal Watch network is complete

quests.lore: The Eternal Watch network spans the realm.

dialogue.speaker: Commander Theron
dialogue.text: Establish watch posts at every settlement.

dialogue.speaker: Commander Theron
dialogue.text: The network is complete. The realm sleeps safer tonight, Warden.

quests.name: Timber Trouble
quests.description: Loggers at Briarwood need help clearing beasts.

steps.text: Speak with Foreman Hask about the wolf problem
Foreman Hask pays you for the work

quests.lore: The lumber mill is vital to the region's economy.

dialogue.speaker: Foreman Hask
dialogue.text: Wolves are denning under the mill platform. We can't work like this.

dialogue.speaker: Foreman Hask
dialogue.text: The mill runs again! Here's your pay, adventurer.

quests.name: The Poacher
quests.description: A poacher is trapping animals near Briarwood.

steps.text: Speak with Ranger Wynn about the traps
Ranger Wynn discovers the smuggler's mark

quests.lore: The poacher worked for a smuggling ring.

dialogue.speaker: Ranger Wynn
dialogue.text: Someone is setting steel traps. The animals suffer needlessly.

dialogue.speaker: Ranger Wynn
dialogue.text: A smuggler's mark on his gear. This goes deeper than poaching.

quests.name: Ancient Stump
quests.description: A druid needs heartwood from the oldest tree.

steps.text: Speak with Druid Lira about the heartwood
Druid Lira senses the living magic

quests.lore: The heartwood still holds living magic.

dialogue.speaker: Druid Lira
dialogue.text: The great stump east of here still breathes with old magic. Bring me its heartwood.

dialogue.speaker: Druid Lira
dialogue.text: I can feel the pulse within. This will heal many.

quests.name: Smuggler's Trail
quests.description: Follow the smuggling trail from Briarwood.

steps.text: Speak with Ranger Wynn about the smuggler trail
Wardstone fragments discovered in the cargo

quests.lore: The smugglers were moving Wardstone fragments.

dialogue.speaker: Ranger Wynn
dialogue.text: The trail leads north into the forest. Be careful — there could be many.

dialogue.speaker: Ranger Wynn
dialogue.text: Wardstone fragments in their cargo? Someone is collecting these on purpose.

quests.name: Ice Fishing
quests.description: Frostmere's lake has frozen over early.

steps.text: Speak with Elder Sif about the frozen lake
Elder Sif worries about the unnatural frost

quests.lore: The early freeze worries the elders.

dialogue.speaker: Elder Sif
dialogue.text: The lake froze two months early. We need fish before our stores run out.

dialogue.speaker: Elder Sif
dialogue.text: Enough for a fortnight. But the early frost is not natural.

quests.name: The Frozen Shrine
quests.description: Something glows beneath the Frostmere ice.

steps.text: Speak with Elder Sif about the blue glow
A Wardstone shard is found frozen in the lake bed

quests.lore: A Wardstone fragment frozen in the lake bed.

dialogue.speaker: Elder Sif
dialogue.text: Fishermen see a blue glow deep under the ice. It wasn't there before.

dialogue.speaker: Elder Sif
dialogue.text: A Wardstone shard, frozen for centuries. The thaw is releasing old magic.

quests.name: Northern Wolves
quests.description: A large wolf pack threatens Frostmere.

steps.text: Speak with Hunter Bjorn about the wolf pack
Hunter Bjorn wonders what drove the wolves south

quests.lore: The pack was driven south by something worse.

dialogue.speaker: Hunter Bjorn
dialogue.text: Biggest pack I've ever seen. Thirty wolves, maybe more, all heading south.

dialogue.speaker: Hunter Bjorn
dialogue.text: They're fleeing something. Whatever drove them south, I don't want to meet it.

quests.name: Mountain Pass
quests.description: The pass to Stonekeep is blocked by rockfall.

steps.text: Speak with Warden Grohl about the blocked pass
Warden Grohl thanks you for clearing the lifeline

quests.lore: Stonekeep controls the only pass through the Ironpeaks.

dialogue.speaker: Warden Grohl
dialogue.text: Rockfall blocked the east pass. Something's nesting in the rubble.

dialogue.speaker: Warden Grohl
dialogue.text: Pass is clear. Stonekeep thanks you — this route is our lifeline.

quests.name: The Deep Mine
quests.description: Strange noises from the abandoned mine.

steps.text: Speak with Warden Grohl about the mine noises

quests.lore: The mine connects to ancient dwarven tunnels.

dialogue.speaker: Warden Grohl
dialogue.text: The old mine echoes with sounds. Miners won't go near it.

dialogue.speaker: Warden Grohl
dialogue.text: Ancient tunnels beneath. The dwarves built deeper than anyone knew.

quests.name: Supply Run

steps.text: Speak with Warden Grohl about needed supplies

quests.lore: The mountain communities depend on each other.

dialogue.speaker: Warden Grohl
dialogue.text: We need iron and grain from Ironhaven. The road is dangerous alone.

dialogue.speaker: Warden Grohl
dialogue.text: Supplies received. Stonekeep endures another season.

quests.name: Water Crisis

steps.text: Speak with Trader Mika about the water crisis
Dusthaven survives with the new spring

quests.lore: The desert is expanding, swallowing the borderlands.

dialogue.speaker: Trader Mika
dialogue.text: The well went dry last week. Without water, Dusthaven dies.

dialogue.speaker: Trader Mika
dialogue.text: An underground spring! We can dig a new well. Dusthaven survives.

quests.name: Sand Bandits

steps.text: Speak with Trader Mika about the caravan raids
The raiders were deserters from a forgotten army

quests.lore: The raiders were deserters from a forgotten army.

dialogue.speaker: Trader Mika
dialogue.text: Three caravans lost this month. The raiders know every shortcut.

dialogue.speaker: Trader Mika
dialogue.text: Deserters from the old wars, still fighting for a kingdom that fell centuries ago.

quests.name: Desert Bloom
quests.description: A rare flower blooms once a decade in the deep desert.

steps.text: Speak with Herbalist Zora about the nightbloom
Herbalist Zora will save many lives

quests.lore: The desert bloom can cure any poison.

dialogue.speaker: Herbalist Zora
dialogue.text: The nightbloom flowers only under a new moon. One grows in the eastern dunes.

dialogue.speaker: Herbalist Zora
dialogue.text: Magnificent! This single bloom will save many lives.

quests.name: Scavenger Hunt
quests.description: Ashfall Camp needs supplies from the wastes.

steps.text: Speak with Boss Kira about scavenging
Boss Kira puts the salvage to good use

quests.lore: The wastes hide treasures from a lost civilization.

dialogue.speaker: Boss Kira
dialogue.text: The old ruins north of here are full of useful scrap. Bring what you find.

dialogue.speaker: Boss Kira
dialogue.text: Good haul! We can patch the walls and fix the water filters.

quests.name: Ashwalker
quests.description: A dangerous creature roams the Ashfall Wastes.

steps.text: Speak with Boss Kira about the ashwalker

quests.lore: The ashwalker was a fire elemental corrupted by volcanic gases.

dialogue.speaker: Boss Kira
dialogue.text: Something stalks the ash fields. Burning footprints where it walks.

dialogue.speaker: Boss Kira
dialogue.text: A fire spirit gone mad. The wastes are a little safer now.

quests.name: Lost Expedition
quests.description: A mining expedition vanished in the wastes.

steps.text: Speak with Boss Kira about the missing miners
Journals mention a sealed door with Wardstone markings

quests.lore: The expedition found something they shouldn't have.

dialogue.speaker: Boss Kira
dialogue.text: Ten miners went east three weeks ago. None returned.

dialogue.speaker: Boss Kira
dialogue.text: Their journals mention a sealed door deep underground. Wardstone markings.

quests.name: Crystal Waters
quests.description: Lakeside needs crystal samples from the lake.

steps.text: Speak with Scholar Fen about the crystals

quests.lore: The crystals contain trace Wardstone energy.

dialogue.speaker: Scholar Fen
dialogue.text: Strange crystals wash ashore. I need samples to study their properties.

dialogue.speaker: Scholar Fen
dialogue.text: Wardstone resonance! The lake itself is imbued with ancient sealing magic.

quests.name: Lake Spirits
quests.description: Spirits rise from Crystal Lake at night.

steps.text: Speak with Scholar Fen about the lake spirits
The spirits guard a sunken Wardstone

quests.lore: The spirits guard a sunken Wardstone.

dialogue.speaker: Scholar Fen
dialogue.text: The fishermen see lights on the water. Spirits, rising from the deep.

dialogue.speaker: Scholar Fen
dialogue.text: They guard what lies beneath — a Wardstone, whole and intact, at the lake bottom.

quests.name: Ferry Repair

steps.text: Speak with Ferryman Pike about the repairs
The south road is open again

quests.lore: The ferry connects Lakeside to the southern settlements.

dialogue.speaker: Ferryman Pike
dialogue.text: My ferry is falling apart. I need good timber from the north shore.

dialogue.speaker: Ferryman Pike
dialogue.text: She'll float another decade now. The south road is open again.

quests.name: Border Watch
quests.description: Duskhollow guards the edge of the Shadowmere.

steps.text: Speak with Watcher Thane about the border patrol
The wraiths grow bolder as the seal weakens

quests.lore: Duskhollow exists to watch for signs of the Betrayer's return.

dialogue.speaker: Watcher Thane
dialogue.text: We are the first line against the shadow. Help us patrol the border.

dialogue.speaker: Watcher Thane
dialogue.text: The wraiths grow bolder. The seal weakens with each passing year.

quests.name: Shadow Artifacts
quests.description: Recover cursed objects leaking from the Shadowmere.

steps.text: Speak with Watcher Thane about the dark objects
Court regalia of the Betrayer King recovered

quests.lore: The artifacts were tools of the Betrayer King's court.

dialogue.speaker: Watcher Thane
dialogue.text: Dark objects wash out of the Shadowmere. They corrupt everything they touch.

dialogue.speaker: Watcher Thane
dialogue.text: Court regalia of the Betrayer King himself. These belong in the Sanctum vault.

quests.name: The Thin Veil
quests.description: The boundary between realms is thinning.

steps.text: Speak with Watcher Thane about the tearing reality
The breach is sealed, but barely

quests.lore: The veil between the mortal realm and the shadow grows thin.

dialogue.speaker: Watcher Thane
dialogue.text: Reality itself is tearing. I can see through to... somewhere else.

dialogue.speaker: Watcher Thane
dialogue.text: Sealed, but barely. The Betrayer King pushes harder every day.

quests.name: The Courier
quests.description: Deliver urgent messages across the realm.
quests.lore: Communication between settlements is vital.

dialogue.speaker: Elder Thomas
dialogue.text: These letters must reach Thornwatch and Briarwood before week's end.

dialogue.speaker: Elder Thomas
dialogue.text: Swift work! The settlements can coordinate their defenses now.

quests.name: Trade Route Survey

steps.text: Speak with Merchant Caelen about mapping routes
Trade will flourish with the new map

quests.lore: Safe trade routes strengthen every settlement.

dialogue.speaker: Merchant Caelen
dialogue.text: I need someone to walk the routes and mark the safe passages.

dialogue.speaker: Merchant Caelen
dialogue.text: With this map, merchants can avoid the worst dangers. Trade will flourish.

quests.name: The Grand Tour
quests.description: Visit every settlement in the realm.

steps.text: Elder Thomas encourages you to see the whole realm

quests.lore: You have walked every road in the realm.

dialogue.speaker: Elder Thomas
dialogue.text: A true hero knows every corner of the land they protect.

dialogue.speaker: Elder Thomas
dialogue.text: You have seen it all. Every village, every frontier. The realm knows its Warden.

quests.name: Mountain to Sea
quests.description: Escort goods from Cinderhold to Mistport.

steps.text: Speak with Master Smith Durin about the shipment
Harbormaster Voss receives the starfall steel

quests.lore: The longest trade route in the realm.

dialogue.speaker: Master Smith Durin
dialogue.text: Mistport ordered a shipment of starfall steel. It needs a strong escort.

dialogue.speaker: Harbormaster Voss
dialogue.text: Starfall steel! This is worth more than gold. Mistport thanks you.

quests.name: Healer's Circuit

steps.text: Speak with Healer Mira about the frontier towns
Every life saved is a victory

quests.lore: Even the most remote settlements deserve care.

dialogue.speaker: Healer Mira
dialogue.text: These medicines must reach the frontier towns. Many are sick.

dialogue.speaker: Healer Mira
dialogue.text: Every life saved is a victory. Thank you for walking so far.
